top_claims.claim: Leadership / governance on watch. 13 executive sales ($23,978,205) in 120d
EPS (basic) growth moved from -45.1% to +21.8% YoY for two consecutive quarters. Source: SEC XBRL quarterly filings.

Royalty Pharma is a diversified pharma royalty aggregator with durable top-line-linked cash collections, a growing marketed portfolio, and an active deal pipeline (including Q1 2026 Biohaven-related financing). FY2025 revenue rose to $2.38 billion while net income was $771 million. At $54.97, the Lawrence base case imp
We expect **-0.9%** per year over 7 years at **~$54.97** on **$1.65/sh** starting owner cash.

risk_claims.claim: *Primary risk: Loss-of-exclusivity or weak launch curves on high-weight royalty products reduce collections while fixed debt remains.
Leverage (~$9.6B debt) raises refinancing and rate risk if collections stall.
Reinvestment risk: new royalties must earn returns above implied market expectations.
